item.title: ‘Puma-like’ big cat sighting reignites mystery of legendary beast roaming UK
item.description: There have been multiple reports of the so-called Kellas cat, a hybrid between a Scottish wildcat and domestic breeds, over the last 40 years.

item.title: Psychic who claims to talk to the dead says they share two regrets about life
First new Nessie ‘sightings’ in months reignite mystery of the Loch Ness Monster
item.description: American tourist Tony Inhorn was the first to report a sighting on March 1 after seeing a 'dark-greenish grey body'

item.title: Woman starts sneezing out bugs after developing an infection
item.description: The unusual ailment, which terrified those who witnessed it, was caused by a parasitic fly’s larvae.

item.title: New mutant tarantula discovered and it’s got massive balls
item.description: The spiders - who have been given the genus Satyrex - live in the Arabian Peninsula and the Horn of Africa.
